title: Style 'Clean' in orange and 'io' in white in the Cleanio header text

requirements.summary: Update the Cleanio wordmark in the Layout component header to display 'Clean' in orange and 'io' in white using separate styled spans
acceptanceCriteria: The header displays 'Cleanio' with 'Clean' visually in orange
The 'io' portion of 'Cleanio' is visually white
The bike logo remains displayed beside the Cleanio wordmark
The styling is consistent across all pages

file_operations.description: Split the 'Cleanio' text into two separate span elements: one for 'Clean' with orange color (using text-orange-500 or the brand orange color class) and one for 'io' with white color (using text-white). Ensure the bike logo remains visible beside the wordmark and the layout remains consistent with the existing header structure.
